provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, tall broad-shouldered white man in his late 30s with a square jaw and a flat expression, wearing a charcoal armored assault suit with ceramic plate inserts visible at the chest and back, reinforced arm and leg panels, mag-lock combat boots with ankle armor, a compact assault weapon slung across the chest, a combat knife in a boot sheath, a squad leader comm unit on the shoulder, the suit has been repainted twice to cover scoring from energy weapon hits

judgment.explanation: Compact faction crew. Regulation shipboard clothing with appropriate wear and institutional identity markers. Muted palette, functional design.
